title: Fractional CMO
description: Senior growth leadership for founders who need sharper decisions, better sequencing, and a marketing system before hiring a full-time leader.
audience: Best for Seed to Series B teams that need strategic leadership without another layer of agency theatre.
promise: You get a calm operator in the room for strategy, prioritisation, team direction, and execution quality.
outcomes: Founder messaging and investor narrative support
Team rituals that keep growth moving
process: Diagnose current constraints and team capacity
Set quarterly growth priorities and decision rules
Guide execution across research, campaigns, and conversion
Document the system so the team gets stronger over time
